name: Apple-Cinnamon Oat Pancakes
recipeIngredient: Martha White Whole Wheat Flour - 1/2 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, stir together flour, oats, sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt.
2. In a separate bowl, beat the egg. Stir in milk, applesauce, and oil.
3. Add the liquid mixture to the dry ingredients and stir until just blended.
4. Fold in the chopped walnuts.
5. Pour about 1/4 cup of batter onto a heated (340) lightly greased skillet or griddle.
6. Brown on one side.
7. Turn the pancakes when the tops are covered with bubbles and the edges begin to look dry.
8. Brown on the other side.
